allowed_paper_wording: Report the cohort as power-limited top-five NSFC evidence with N=53 primary cells.
Use official/generated coordination score or official report score.
The corrected top-five primary comparison showed a weak favorable direction, but p=0.30 and the confidence interval includes zero.
No robust incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was demonstrated (power-limited, top-five cohort, N=53; apparent favorable direction not IPV-specific).
LOSO was approximately zero and does not establish scenario generalization.
Safe-subset robustness was not established; S1 and S2 duplicate the primary cells and S3 is too small to support the direction.
The favorable direction was not specific to directional IPV diagnostics; controls matched or exceeded the primary delta.
Replication confirmed implementation soundness while leaving significance, generalization, and specificity unresolved.
No blind-annotation result is included in the Tier basis.
NPC material can only be framed as unmatched boundary context; future work would require matched opportunity structure evidence.
State-dependence did not rescue the primary result; no interpretable row reached q<=0.10.
Describe the conformal element as an InterHub-calibrated support boundary.
D_comp marks below-norm competitive shortfall and D_yield marks above-norm yielding excess relative to the InterHub human conditional norm.
